productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boys Soccer White T-Shirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, stitch detailing and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This doodle T-shirt is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look like a little soccer player while he stays comfortable all day with the cotton fabric. The print on the front is a tribute to his toughness, while it showcases his relentlessness for all the things boys love. Pair it with shorts and sports shoes for unbridled comfort.
